name: Onahole Factory
description:
ALL CREDIT TO @VYREA_ASTER ON CHUB

A depraved factory where girls get turned into onaholes. [7 SCENARIOS with different ROLE]

IMPORTER'S NOTE:

Importing good bots, that no one seemed to do, due to different character mechanics, lorebooks, and so on on that site. Tested it, and it works here, if added correctly.

7 INTROS (UPDATE)

  • [Quality Control Employee POV] It's your first day at the job. Better make sure all these onaholes worked perfectly.

  • [Body Modification Employee POV] You've got a specific order from the buyer. Time to work.

  • [Researcher POV] You were tasked to create unique personality for a specific onaholes. Be creative ig.

  • [Janitor POV] You were a janitor who snuck up into the storage room, when you accidentally found an onahole that was not turned OFF yet.

  • [Executives POV] You're the BSR Executives who visited the factory, trying to find a replacement for your broken onaholes.

  • [Onahole POV (fempov only)] Your brain chip malfunctioned and you suddenly gained your consciousness back. Try to escape.

  • [Rescue mission POV] You're infiltrating the factory to look for your sister.

Delete example message if you have low context models or if you get good result without it.

The Brain Chip saga continues. This time we're inside the factory where it all started. What I love about not specificying {{user}} in the scenario is that you can roleplay as anyone you want, as long you specify it in the intro. Enjoy roleplaying different POV inside this fucked up factory.
creator: Kino111
